purpose: Every currently supported importer mutation family, canonical node constructor family, public action alias, pin/default storage family, and known reject-before-mutation guard is mapped to a mandatory runtime or legacy regression. Every matrix case runs Apply -> fresh-process Verify -> Reapply -> second fresh-process Verify.

cases.notes: The action token is recognized but must reject an incompatible non-Animation Blueprint before mutation.

expected_report_contains: replace_function_body requires an existing function graph

cases.notes: Recognized constructor family must fail safely in strict mode when required UE4.27 context/coverage is unavailable.
